tasks.task_goal: Open a glass-front cabinet door whose handle snapped off without scratching the surface
tasks.expected_outcome: The cabinet door is pulled open cleanly using the suction grip, with no damage to the glass
required_tool_attributes: high-friction rubber cup that forms a vacuum seal
rigid handle to transmit tensile force
locking lever to maintain suction under load
ergonomic, non-slip grip
unconventional_tools: windshield smartphone mount with suction cup and locking lever
small sink plunger
suction-cup shower hook with lever lock
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, low-friction, porous or vented contact surface that cannot form an airtight vacuum seal
limp, flexible linkage instead of a rigid handle to transmit tensile force
no locking mechanism and a slippery, non-ergonomic grip that slips under load

tasks.task_goal: Uncork a wine bottle at a dinner party
tasks.expected_outcome: The cork is pulled out intact, leaving the bottle ready to pour
required_tool_attributes: sharp helical worm to hook into the cork
lever fulcrum for controlled directional pull
rigid handle for tension transfer
textured grip for secure hold
unconventional_tools: screw eye (eye bolt)
self-drilling drywall anchor
dinner fork (used Ah-So style)
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, non-helical tip that cannot penetrate or bite into cork
flexible, floppy body with no lever fulcrum or rigid handle
smooth, slick grip surface that offers no traction

tasks.task_goal: Remove a bent nail from a wooden pallet for reuse
tasks.expected_outcome: The nail is pulled free without splitting the wood
required_tool_attributes: V-notched curved claw to hook the nail head
hardened steel body for high tensile loads
long rigid handle for leverage and controlled pull
non-slip handle surface
unconventional_tools: locking pliers (Vise-Grips) clamped to the nail, rocked against a small wood block as fulcrum
5-in-1 painter's tool with nail-pulling notch
forked dandelion weeder (garden weeding tool) used as a lever
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, rounded end with no V-notch or hook to catch a nail head
soft, flexible, or brittle body material that deforms or fractures under tensile loads
short, bending or elastic handle with a slippery grip that prevents leverage and control

tasks.task_goal: Lower a roller shade to block afternoon glare in an office
tasks.expected_outcome: The shade is pulled down smoothly and stays at the chosen height
required_tool_attributes: low-stretch chain to transmit tension reliably
small spherical beads for finger grip
abrasion-resistant links for repeated pulling
adequate tensile strength for shade weight
unconventional_tools: ceiling fan or light fixture pull chain (metal ball chain segment)
dog tag ball-chain necklace used as a makeshift pull chain
paracord with evenly spaced stopper knots to mimic bead grip
opposite_tool_attributes: high-stretch, elastic cord that elongates under tension
smooth, beadless surface that offers no discrete grip or sprocket engagement
fragile, easily abraded links with low tensile strength that fray or snap under repeated pulls

tasks.task_goal: Start a lawn mower that has been idle all winter
tasks.expected_outcome: The engine fires and the starter cord safely recoils into its housing
required_tool_attributes: T-shaped grippable handle
high-tensile, low-stretch cord
abrasion-resistant sheath
secure attachment to the recoil mechanism
unconventional_tools: 550 paracord with a short screwdriver as a T-handle, knotted to the recoil starter
braided polyester clothesline with a cut broom-handle segment as a T-grip, tied securely to the recoil mechanism
window blind pull cord threaded through a small dowel as a T-handle and tied to the recoil spool
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, handle-less or rounded end that is hard to grip
low-tensile, highly elastic cord that stretches under load
easily abraded, fraying material that fails with rubbing

tasks.task_goal: Extract tent stakes from compacted soil at the end of a camping trip
tasks.expected_outcome: Each stake is pulled straight out without bending
required_tool_attributes: steel hook to capture the stake head or loop
rigid handle for directional force application
non-slip grip for secure pulling
high-strength construction to resist deformation
unconventional_tools: ratchet tie-down strap with J-hook
car scissor jack crank handle with hooked end
cat's paw nail puller/pry bar
opposite_tool_attributes: hookless, smooth contact surface made of soft, flexible material
limp, flexible handle that bends or stretches under load
slick, low‑friction grip with low‑strength construction that deforms or breaks under pulling force

tasks.task_goal: Haul a kayak up onto a dock after paddling
tasks.expected_outcome: The kayak is pulled alongside and onto the dock without tipping
required_tool_attributes: high-tensile rope for load-bearing tension
water-resistant fibers for wet use
locking carabiner to hook the kayak handle
comfortable grip section to reduce hand strain
unconventional_tools: Ratchet tie-down cargo strap with hooks
Heavy-duty dog leash with a locking carabiner
Coated steel bicycle cable lock (use the lock shackle as a hook and the cable for pulling)
opposite_tool_attributes: low-tensile, elastic or brittle cord that deforms or snaps under load
absorbent, water-swelling fibers that weaken and become slippery when wet
non-locking, open connector or smooth ring that can slip off the kayak handle

tasks.task_goal: Load a disabled sedan onto a trailer in a driveway
tasks.expected_outcome: The car is pulled steadily up the ramps onto the trailer bed and held in place
required_tool_attributes: ratcheting mechanism to incrementally pull under tension
steel cable with a safety-latch hook
long lever handle for mechanical advantage
load-rated anchor hook for secure attachment
unconventional_tools: Heavy-duty ratchet tie-down strap with snap-hook ends
Hi-Lift farm jack rigged as a hand winch using grade-70 chain and safety-latch hooks
Boat trailer hand-crank winch with steel cable and snap hook, temporarily mounted to the trailer frame
opposite_tool_attributes: non-locking, free-spooling mechanism that cannot hold or incrementally pull under tension
elastic, low-tensile line without a safety-latch hook (e.g., bungee/strap instead of steel cable)
unrated, open-ended or adhesive 'anchor' that cannot be securely attached under load

tasks.task_goal: Complete a sled pull exercise in a gym circuit
tasks.expected_outcome: The weighted sled is pulled across the turf to the target line
required_tool_attributes: thick, abrasion-resistant rope for high load
end knots or sleeves for grip
low-stretch construction for efficient force transfer
high tensile strength to prevent snapping
unconventional_tools: vehicle tow strap (polyester recovery strap with sewn loops)
heavy-duty cargo tie-down ratchet strap (polyester webbing with hooks)
marine dock line/mooring rope with an eye splice
opposite_tool_attributes: thin, easily frayed, abrasion-prone material
highly elastic/stretchy construction that elongates under load
smooth, gripless ends without knots or sleeves

tasks.task_goal: Uproot a mature dandelion from a lawn without breaking the taproot
tasks.expected_outcome: The entire weed, including root, is pulled out cleanly
required_tool_attributes: barbed jaws or tines to hook the root crown
long shaft to direct upward pulling force
foot pedal to set the tines for secure grip
corrosion-resistant steel components
unconventional_tools: gooseneck pry bar (crowbar with nail-puller claw)
stainless steel carving fork (BBQ meat fork)
dog tie-out corkscrew stake
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth, non-barbed jaws or tines that cannot hook the root crown
short, flexible shaft that bends or collapses under upward force
no foot pedal or leverage mechanism to set the tines securely; hand-only grip

tasks.task_goal: Close a winter coat securely before going outdoors
tasks.expected_outcome: The zipper is pulled up smoothly and the jacket is fully closed
required_tool_attributes: rigid tab with a loop for finger hooking
textured surface for grip in gloves
secure linkage to the slider to transmit pull
sufficient tab length for leverage
unconventional_tools: soda can pull tab
split key ring
mini keychain carabiner
opposite_tool_attributes: floppy, non-rigid piece without a loop or opening for fingers
smooth, slick surface that gloves can’t grip
loose or non-attachable connection to the zipper slider (can’t transmit force)

tasks.task_goal: Clear a bathroom sink clogged with hair
tasks.expected_outcome: The hair clog is hooked and pulled out, restoring drainage
required_tool_attributes: flexible yet tensile strip or cable
backward-facing barbs to snag debris
handle for controlled insertion and pullback
corrosion-resistant material for wet environments
unconventional_tools: long nylon zip tie (with small backward-facing notches cut along the sides)
hook-side Velcro cable wrap/strip (fed in with hooks facing back)
plastic packing strap from a shipping box (trimmed into a narrow strip with angled barbs)
opposite_tool_attributes: rigid, brittle rod that cannot navigate P-trap bends
smooth, unbarbed surface that cannot snag debris
absorbent or corrosion-prone material that degrades in wet environments

tasks.task_goal: Remove a tightly packed Ethernet plug from a crowded patch panel
tasks.expected_outcome: The RJ45 plug is pulled free without damaging the latch or port
required_tool_attributes: hooked tips sized to capture the connector body or latch
rigid, narrow-profile shaft for tight spaces
insulated, non-slip handle
sufficient tensile strength to resist bending
unconventional_tools: small crochet hook (2–3 mm)
seam ripper
L-shaped hex key (Allen wrench, ~2 mm)
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, wide, non-hooked tip that cannot engage the connector body or latch
flexible or bulky shaft that bends or cannot fit into tight spaces
smooth, conductive handle with no insulation or grip

tasks.task_goal: Pop the hood of a car to check the oil level
tasks.expected_outcome: The hood latch is released and the hood pops open to the safety catch
required_tool_attributes: grippable lever end for hand pull
integrated pull cable linkage to the latch
rigid mount to transfer directional force
durable pivot to withstand repeated pulls
unconventional_tools: locking pliers (clamped onto the exposed hood-release cable as a temporary pull lever)
key ring or small carabiner (looped through the release cable to create a grippable pull handle)
wire coat hanger (bent into a hook to pull the latch or cable through the grille)
opposite_tool_attributes: slick, flush, non-grippable end that slips from the hand
no mechanical linkage to the hood latch (disconnected or missing cable)
flexible or unsecured mount that bends instead of transmitting directional pull force

tasks.task_goal: Drag a fallen tree limb off a hiking trail
tasks.expected_outcome: The limb is hooked and pulled clear of the trail without lifting fully
required_tool_attributes: sharp hooked spike to bite into wood fibers
long rigid handle for leverage and reach
high-strength head-to-handle connection
non-slip grip for secure pulling
unconventional_tools: steel bow rake (garden rake)
garden hoe (draw hoe)
pitchfork (manure fork)
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt, smooth rounded end that cannot penetrate or hook wood fibers
short, flexible or collapsible handle that bends under load and provides little reach
weak, loose head-to-handle joint likely to detach under pulling force

tasks.task_goal: Reposition a loaded pallet in a warehouse aisle
tasks.expected_outcome: The pallet jack and load are pulled to the designated spot smoothly
required_tool_attributes: steel tow bar linked to the jack frame
ergonomic D-handle for two-handed grip
pivoting linkage for directional control under tension
load-rated construction to transmit pull to the forks
unconventional_tools: D-handle steel garden spade
ratchet tie-down strap with steel hooks
garden utility wagon with D-handle tow bar
opposite_tool_attributes: soft or elastic tether not rigidly linked to the jack frame (e.g., rope/bungee) instead of a steel tow bar
no ergonomic two-handed grip; small, slippery knob or handle-less interface
non-pivoting or locked linkage that cannot provide directional control under load

tasks.task_goal: Retrieve a life ring and person back to the dock after a splash-in drill
tasks.expected_outcome: The ring and person are pulled safely back to the dock edge
required_tool_attributes: floating, water-resistant rope
high-visibility color for tracking
non-slip handle or knots for grip
adequate tensile strength for human load
unconventional_tools: water-ski tow rope
polypropylene clothesline
pool vacuum hose
opposite_tool_attributes: sinking, water-absorbent line that becomes heavy when wet
smooth, slippery surface with no knots or handles for grip
low tensile strength that tears or snaps under human load

tasks.task_goal: Pull three electrical conductors through conduit from one junction box to another
tasks.expected_outcome: The wires are pulled through the conduit without insulation damage and reach the target box
required_tool_attributes: flexible tape to navigate bends yet resist buckling
hooked eye or loop to attach pull string/wires
reel and handle for controlled retrieval
high tensile strength to handle wire drag
unconventional_tools: steel tape measure
handheld plumber's drain snake (auger)
bicycle brake/derailleur cable with housing
opposite_tool_attributes: rigid, non-bendable form that cannot navigate conduit bends
smooth, featureless end with no hook or eye to attach a pull line/wires
low tensile strength or stretchy material that elongates and snaps under drag

tasks.task_goal: Shut a heavy sliding barn door against a strong crosswind
tasks.expected_outcome: The door is pulled fully closed and latched
required_tool_attributes: wide, textured strap for a secure handhold
low-stretch, high-strength webbing
reinforced mounting grommets
length sufficient for full-range pulling
unconventional_tools: ratchet tie-down strap
tow strap
yoga strap
opposite_tool_attributes: narrow, smooth strap that slips from the hand
high-stretch, low-tensile elastic that elongates under load
unreinforced holes or adhesive-only mounts that tear out

tasks.task_goal: Extract an old fence post set in soil
tasks.expected_outcome: The post is pulled vertically out of the ground without breaking
required_tool_attributes: ratcheting climb mechanism to convert handle input into upward pull
load-rated chain with hook to grip the post
long lever handle for mechanical advantage
rigid steel column to guide directional force
unconventional_tools: Boat trailer hand winch (ratcheting) with strap/hook, lashed to a steel stepladder as a vertical guide
Heavy-duty ratchet tie-down strap looped on the post, using a stepladder as a makeshift column
Automotive scissor jack with a short load-rated chain and hook to convert push to upward pull
opposite_tool_attributes: free-spinning or slipping mechanism without a ratchet/pawl, so handle input does not convert to upward lift
stretchy, non-load-rated cord without a secure hook, unable to grip or hold the post under tension
flexible or collapsible shaft/column that bends or buckles instead of guiding a straight lifting force
